properties.name: clickable-card
properties.description: Indicates whether card should be a ``.

properties.name: href
properties.description: Sets the element's href, changes card tag to `` .

events.name: click
events.description: Fires when a pointing device button (such as a mouse's primary mouse button) is both pressed and released while the pointer is located inside the element.

events.name: focus
events.description: Fires when the element receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Fires when the element loses focus.

events.name: keydown
events.description: Fires when a key is pressed.

events.name: keyup
events.description: Fires when a key is released.

events.name: input
events.description: Fires when the value of an element has been changed.

slots.name: Graphic
slots.description: Add graphic element to card. Overrides the icon property

slots.name: Media
slots.description: Use to display images or video content above the card header

slots.name: Meta
slots.description: Use for adding action content, of info in the card header
